title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following approaches to reducing crime and improving justice systems, then decide which two would be most effective.
options: Investing in youth outreach and early intervention programmes
Improving rehabilitation and education in prisons
Addressing poverty and inequality as root causes of crime
Strengthening community policing and neighbourhood trust
Introducing restorative justice programmes as alternatives to prison

script.text: Now decide which two would be most effective.

Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to crime, justice and rehabilitation. Discuss the following approaches to reducing crime and improving justice systems, then decide which two would be most effective. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
